  raise: "I'm raising to thin the field and build the pot with position or a strong hand."

COACH (leaning): You're on the Small Blind with A♠ A♥. No one has raised yet — you have the initiative.  Your Pocket As is strong. You have a clear story to tell. Call. The price is right to continue. GTO leans call (59%).
